schema_notes.delta_fields: energy, stress, money, social, health, hygiene, fun, discipline — each an integer delta per action
schema_notes.time_of_day: array of valid periods: morning, afternoon, evening, night, any
schema_notes.repeatable: true if the action can be performed multiple times per day
